beginner.label: Beginner
beginner.description: No prior cloud experience required. Concepts are explained from first principles.

intermediate.label: Intermediate

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: For experienced engineers. Deep dives into architecture and trade-offs.

prerequisite_of.description: A must be learned before B

implemented_by.description: Concept is implemented by a specific technology

part_of.description: Component is part of a larger system

related_to.description: Concepts are related but not in a hierarchy

certified_by.description: Skill or knowledge is validated by a certification
